definitions: 可耕种的；适于耕作的（常见搭配：arable land 可耕地）

examples.text: who had financed his return to power with land concessions. By the 1930s, one company dominated the region: United Fruit, who owned over 40% of Guatemala’s arable land at one point. They cleared rainforest in Costa Rica, Colombia, Guatemala, Honduras, and Panama to build plantations,
examples.explanation: 这里的 arable land 指“可耕地、适合种植作物的土地”。句子说联合果品公司一度拥有危地马拉 40% 以上的可耕地，强调其对土地资源的高度控制。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
